title: Ad Astra 3D
description: This pack adds stylized 3d planets to Ad Astra mod!
body:
# Stylized 3D planets for Ad Astra!

**Space** is _beautiful_, and just some pixel art on the skybox does not convey the beauty of the outer space. This resourcepack aims to make **Ad Astra planets** beautiful, just like real planets are. 

## Some screenshots!

**Earth from the moon space station**
![Earth from the moon space station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7d87c96b5742dd98ac4b0221e081c89e426482f.png)

**The sun that is visible from mercury**
![The sun visible from mercury](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5a68d5b98a49664dd0260f3591ec3c7989aac1b.png)

**Mars from space**
![Mars from space](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555b02fcfa83574f4ce33e780215d9f45a880424.png)
